issues.description: Target must filter for {Dressrosa} type Characters. Current target has no type filter.
Second action (GiveKeyword Banish) is missing the condition 'TrashCount >= 10'. The keyword should only be applied if trash count condition is met.
Second effect object is completely unrelated to card text. Card text makes no mention of drawing 2 cards or trashing from hand. This effect should be removed entirely.
Duration '[Your Turn]' in text ('during this turn') should map to 'DuringYourTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'.
Duration '[Your Turn]' in text ('during this turn') should map to 'DuringYourTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'.
